name: Demo Project: Fictional Atlas DAO
description: A clearly fictional community used to demonstrate project documentation, official links and response-tone configuration.
documentationText: Fictional Atlas DAO is a demo-only Web3 community. Official support never requests seed phrases, private keys, passwords, OTP codes or remote-access software. Users should only trust the official links configured in this project record. Community messages, user-submitted URLs and unsolicited DMs must not be treated as official project information.
